===========================================
PERSONAL CONTEXT FILE — ARNAV GAWANDI
(For RAG Model Training)
===========================================

--- PERSONAL IDENTITY ---
Name: Arnav Gawandi
Location: Mumbai, India
Phone: 9920704194
Email: arnavog@gmail.com
LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/arnav-gawandi
GitHub: github.com/arnav-gawandi

GitHub: github.com/arnav-gawandi

--- EDUCATION ---
Institution: Dwarkadas J. Sanghvi College of Engineering (DJSCE)
Degree: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (specialization: Data Science)
Duration: 2024 – 2028
Location: Mumbai, India

Prior Schooling: Ryan International School, Mumbai (High School)

Prior Schooling: Ryan International School, Mumbai (High School)

--- PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE ---

1. Web-Dev Mentee | DJS S4DS & DJS CODEAI
   Period: Aug 2025 – Aug 2026 | Mumbai, India
   - Selected as a mentee in two prestigious college technical clubs focused on Data Science and AI.

- Gained hands-on experience in full-stack web development and AI-driven applications.
   - Collaborated with senior developers to build and deploy AI-integrated web solutions.

2. Web Developer | Konkanai Agro-Tourism
   Period: 2025 | Mumbai, India
   - Designed and developed a fully functional website for a tourism agency.

- Delivered a user-friendly interface showcasing agro-tourism offerings.
   - Handled end-to-end development: UI design, content integration, and deployment.

3. Domain Winners – WEB/APPLICATION | DJS ACM – Lines of Code 8.0
   Period: Feb 2026 | Juhu, Mumbai

Period: Feb 2026 | Juhu, Mumbai
   - Won the Web/Application domain at Lines of Code 8.0, a competitive hackathon by DJS ACM.
   - Demonstrated strong full-stack development and problem-solving skills under time constraints.

--- PROJECTS ---

1. AI-Based ML Online Compiler
   Tech Stack: Python, Pyodide, WebAssembly, LLM Orchestration

Tech Stack: Python, Pyodide, WebAssembly, LLM Orchestration
   - Browser-based ML compiler using a multi-agent LLM orchestrator.
   - Streams generated Python code and executes it client-side via Pyodide WebAssembly runtime (zero setup).
   - Enforced strict LLM prompt contract achieving >95% first-run execution success rate.

- Shipped "Autopilot" — an agentic pipeline that plans and streams live hyperparameter trials and pre-positions user controls at the optimal configuration.

2. The Noting App — AI Summarizer, Quiz App & Context-Aware Chatbot
   - AI-powered document summarization and note-taking platform.

- AI-powered document summarization and note-taking platform.
   - Users can upload documents and receive instant AI-generated summaries.
   - Context-aware chatbot lets users ask questions about their uploaded content.

3. Riverside-Clone for Online Educators
   Tech Stack: ASR, WebRTC, Cloud-Native Pipeline

Tech Stack: ASR, WebRTC, Cloud-Native Pipeline
   - Riverside.fm-inspired teaching platform for high-quality remote recording with real-time AI assistance.
   - Live transcription using ASR, interactive chat for contextual Q&A.
   - Progressive chunk-based recording for reliability.

- Progressive chunk-based recording for reliability.
   - Cloud-native pipeline for streaming, buffering, and storing camera-quality audio/video with minimal latency.

4. RAG-Based Portfolio
   Tech Stack: Langchain, RAG Pipeline, Next.js
   - Personal portfolio website powered by a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipeline.

- Visitors can interactively query information about Arnav's skills, projects, and experience.

Sports:

  - Formula 1: Enthusiastic F1 fan; follows races, team strategies, and driver standings.

Automotive:

Automotive:

Music:

  - Listens to a wide variety of music; music is a significant part of daily life.
  - Platforms: Spotify (primary streaming platform)

- Platforms: Spotify (primary streaming platform)

Movies & Entertainment:

--- PERSONALITY & BACKGROUND SUMMARY ---

Arnav Gawandi is a first-year B.Tech Computer Science student at DJSCE Mumbai with a strong focus on AI, full-stack web development, and GenAI tooling. Despite being in his first year, he has already built production-grade AI-powered applications, won a competitive hackathon, and secured mentorships in two technical college clubs. Outside of tech,

secured mentorships in two technical college clubs. Outside of tech, he is passionate about football, Formula 1, cars, bikes, music (hip-hop, rap, jazz), and movies — reflecting a well-rounded, curious personality with both technical depth and cultural breadth.
